description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Temptation Sports shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for playing sport and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in orange and brown with a flat heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper with overlays, and mesh inlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)Pull tab at the heelPhylon midsole Rubber outsole with pointed nubs at the forefoot and heel, terraced lugs at the midfootHeel reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
